parameters.query: SELECT role, content FROM chatbot_memory WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.sessionId }}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT category, question, answer FROM chatbot_knowledge WHERE company_id = '{{ $('Valideer Input').item.json.companyId }}' AND active = true ORDER BY category LIMIT 50

INSERT INTO chatbot_memory (session_id, company_id, role, content) VALUES ('{{ $('Parse Respons').item.json.sessionId }}', '{{ $('Parse Respons').item.json.companyId }}', 'user', '{{ $('Parse Respons').item.json.userMessage.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')

INSERT INTO chatbot_memory (session_id, company_id, role, content) VALUES ('{{ $('Parse Respons').item.json.sessionId }}', '{{ $('Parse Respons').item.json.companyId }}', 'assistant', '{{ $('Parse Respons').item.json.answer.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
